description: Wizards of the Coast publishes tabletop, trading card, and digital game brands including Magic: The Gathering and Dungeons & Dragons. The main `wizards.com` site is a brand portal linking to those products and related services.
summary: wizards.com exposes a public GraphQL endpoint at `https://api.tabletop.wizards.com/silverbeak-griffin-service/graphql`; no documented REST/OpenAPI APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs were found on the domain.
